flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ohlone College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.1k → $8.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Ohlone College rose 181% between 2007 and 2010 (3.3k → 9.4k).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Ohlone College are 29% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($54.3k vs $42.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Ohlone College rose 20% between 2009 and 2010 (8.5% → 10.2%).
